_comment: Config-TUI schema for the [claude] grove.toml extension. Handwritten mirror of ClaudeConfig in core/pkg/claudenotebook/config.go (yaml/toml tag names + jsonschema descriptions) — keep in sync when adding fields there. Composed into grove's Configuration Editor via grove/tools/config-schema-generator/fragments.json; the root 'claude' property is titled 'Agent Settings' (the sidebar label, applied via configui's display-name override).
title: Grove Agent Settings
description: Schema for the 'claude' extension in grove.toml.

claude.title: Agent Settings
claude.description: Claude Code agent settings grove propagates into each workspace/worktree's .claude/settings.local.json (permissions, sandbox, model, plugins, folder-trust).

allow.description: List of Claude Code permission rules to allow without prompting

deny.description: List of Claude Code permission rules to deny

defaultMode.description: Claude Code default permission mode; commonly default, acceptEdits, plan, bypassPermissions, or auto; free-form passthrough, empty means unset

enabled.description: Enable OS-level sandboxing of tool calls

failIfUnavailable.description: Fail if sandboxing is requested but unavailable

allowUnsandboxedCommands.description: When false, ignore the Bash dangerouslyDisableSandbox escape hatch so every command must run sandboxed

excludedCommands.description: Named commands allowed to run unsandboxed (the vetted replacement for the blanket per-call escape hatch)

allowWrite.description: Directories the sandbox allows writing to

denyWrite.description: Paths the OS sandbox forbids writing to (Bash/child-process writes), enforced even under bypassPermissions

denyRead.description: Paths the OS sandbox forbids reading from

allowedDomains.description: Domains the sandbox allows network access to

allowUnixSockets.description: Unix-domain socket paths the sandbox allows connecting to (connect-only, per path)

allowAllUnixSockets.description: When true, allow connecting AND binding unix-domain sockets at any path (coarse; opens docker.sock/SSH/GPG agents)

allowLocalBinding.description: When true, allow binding localhost TCP ports

inherit.description: When false, this block's arrays replace (rather than union with) lower cascade layers

allowGroveTools.description: When true, allow all canonical grove ecosystem CLIs (grove, flow, cx, nb, ...) via Bash rules for both the installed tool and its worktree-built ./bin binary

protectConfig.description: When true, deny sandbox+native writes to grove config files so a sandboxed agent cannot edit the config that sandboxes it; false actively strips those grove-owned entries

manageTrust.description: When true, grove manages Claude folder-trust in ~/.claude.json (seed on worktree creation, prune orphans on daemon reconcile); opt-in, default off

autoMode.description: Claude Code auto-mode classifier sections consulted by the auto permission mode

allow.description: Auto-mode allow section; use "$defaults" to splice in Claude's built-ins

soft_deny.description: Auto-mode soft_deny section; use "$defaults" to splice in Claude's built-ins

environment.description: Auto-mode environment section; use "$defaults" to splice in Claude's built-ins

hard_deny.description: Auto-mode hard_deny section; use "$defaults" to splice in Claude's built-ins

useAutoModeDuringPlan.description: When true, apply the auto-mode classifier during plan mode to auto-approve safe read-only calls

model.description: Claude Code model (alias like opus/sonnet or a full model ID); free-form passthrough, empty means unset

effortLevel.description: Claude Code reasoning effort level (e.g. high, medium, low); free-form passthrough, empty means unset

editorMode.description: Claude Code editor mode (e.g. vim, normal); free-form passthrough, empty means unset

tui.description: Claude Code tui setting (terminal UI selector); free-form passthrough, empty means unset

skipDangerousModePermissionPrompt.description: When true, skip Claude Code's confirmation prompt for the dangerous bypass mode (useful for headless agents)

skipWorkflowUsageWarning.description: When true, skip Claude Code's workflow usage warning

agentPushNotifEnabled.description: When true, enable Claude Code push notifications for agent sessions

enabledPlugins.description: Claude Code enabledPlugins map (plugin identifier -> enabled); merged per key across layers
